response: Japan, with a population of 125 million, boasts a robust economy marked by a GDP of $4.2 trillion and a GDP growth rate of 1.1%. The country maintains a low unemployment rate of 2.6% and an inflation rate of 3.2%, while its high debt-to-GDP ratio stands at 263%; life expectancy in Japan is an impressive 84.6 years, and it exports goods worth $756 billion.
